title: astragalus stevenianus
intro: Astragalus stevenianus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the pea family, native to Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus stevenianus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and enhancing cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
